channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Celebrating Jessica Patton Barkentin: A Glimpse into 1940s Fashion Photography
item.description: Jessica Patton Barkentin was a prominent fashion model of the mid-20th century, embodying the refined elegance and quiet sophistication of the 1940s and ’50s. Her career spanned collaborations with le...

item.title: Spain Coach Expects Marc Cucurella to Honor Tattoo Promise After World Cup Victory

item.title: Heavy rainfall triggers floods and landslides, killing 16 in J&K, Uttarakhand, Nagaland
item.description: Sixteen people were killed across Jammu and Kashmir (J&K), Uttarakhand, and Nagaland due to heavy rainfall that triggered flash floods and landslides. J&K was the worst-affected region, with 11 deaths...

item.title: Nauru detainees struggle with inadequate support and rising costs

item.title: Oil Prices Rise Amid Escalating US-Iran Tensions in Middle East

item.title: Cameroon's Gold Exports: Challenges in Tracking Illicit Trade
item.description: The article investigates the significant issue of Cameroon's gold exports, revealing that only about 5% of the country's gold production is legally exported. The majority of the gold leaves the countr...

item.title: Alfred Meyer Challenges New York Times' Radiation Safety Narrative
